response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of full-stack experience with direct alignment on TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. His current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Testing culture is a standout — he built testing libraries and ran TDD workshops. The main gaps are React (favored Ember.js) and no explicit Nest.js experience, both core to the primary stack, though his strong architectural fundamentals and polyglot background suggest he can close these gaps quickly.
strengths: Explicit AI agent and MCP framework experience at current role, directly matching the job's AI agent development requirement
Deep testing culture: created D-lang testing libraries, ran TDD workshops, and has practised TDD, pairing, and trunk-based development throughout career
Broad cloud and infrastructure experience: AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD — all relevant to enterprise internal tooling context
concerns: No explicit React experience; primary frontend framework across the resume is Ember.js, which may require ramp-up on the required React stack
Nest.js is absent from the resume entirely, and it is the primary backend framework for this role
Vitest is not mentioned; though strong testing fundamentals exist, no direct familiarity with the project's chosen test runner is demonstrated
